title: iria corynocarya
intro: Iria corynocarya, also known as Iria, is a plant species that belongs to the family Annonaceae, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Iria include the ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Iria is typically prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, where the leaves and roots are steeped in hot water to release their medicinal properties.
